goal: Scenario rotation: each setup.ps1/sh launch picks the next scenario in rotation (1v1 → 1v2 → 1v3 → wrap). scripts/conduit_tui/scenarios.py persists state at ~/.conduit/state.json with scenario_index; reads voice pool from data/dataset/manifest.json when present (the real ElevenLabs corpus) else falls back to a hardcoded premade voice list. CONDUIT_SCENARIO=1v2 env override for one-shot without advancing pointer. Wired into conversation_screen._start_loop: picks scenario, announces in bot_log, passes primary bot voice_id to ElevenLabsClient. Foundation for phase 05 multi-bot meeting mode.
